description_long: This is a six-wheeled, military-style armored personnel carrier painted in matte olive green. The vehicle features a sloped, angular front with multiple vision ports and headlamps, and a reinforced body with visible armor plating along the sides and front. There are two prominent red star insignias on each side near the rear, and a white chevron marking on both front doors. The open-top rear compartment is equipped with bench seating and a spare tire mounted at the back. The tires are large, rugged, and designed for off-road use, while the overall build suggests a focus on troop transport and light tactical operations.
description: A six-wheeled, olive green armored personnel carrier with red star insignias, sloped armor, and an open rear compartment with bench seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, three large off-road tires, red star insignia, and white chevron marking.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped armored nose, headlamps, vision ports, and angular design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with visible red star and chevron, and clear view of the open rear compartment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open troop compartment, bench seating, and spare tire mounted at the back.
attribute_armor_plating: Visible sloped armor plating covers the front and sides of the vehicle, appearing moderately thick and designed for ballistic protection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive green paint scheme with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Red star insignias on both sides near the rear; white chevron markings on both front doors.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, suitable for rugged terrain; one spare tire mounted at the rear.
